headline: Fitch Rates DIRECTV's Proposed Senior Secured Debt Offering 'BB+'/'RR2'
summary: Fitch Ratings has assigned DIRECTV Financing, LLC's proposed $1,400 million senior secured notes due 2032 a 'BB+' rating with a Recovery Rating of 'RR2'.The senior secured notes are issued by...
